recommendations.title: A Quiet Place
recommendations.overview: A family is forced to live in silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place Part II
recommendations.overview: Following the events at home, the Abbott family now face the terrors of the outside world. Forced to venture into the unknown, they realize that the creatures that hunt by sound are not the only threats that lurk beyond the sand path.

recommendations.title: The Puppet Masters
recommendations.overview: The Midwest USA is invaded by stingray-shaped alien slugs that ride on people's backs and control their minds in order to spread their dominion. Government agency reps Sam Givens, Andrew Nivens, and Mary Sefton must stop the aliens.

recommendations.title: The Night Eats the World
recommendations.overview: After waking up to find himself all alone in an apartment where a massive party was being held the night before, Sam is immediately forced to face a terrifying reality: the living dead have invaded the streets of Paris.

recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: Hostile
recommendations.overview: Juliette, a lone survivor of an apocalyptic era, fights to survive against hunger, thirst, a broken leg and strange disturbing creatures that only come out at nighttime.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: C.H.U.D.
recommendations.overview: A rash of bizarre murders in New York City seems to point to a group of grotesquely deformed vagrants living in the sewers. A courageous policeman, a photojournalist and his girlfriend, and a nutty bum, who seems to know a lot about the creatures, ba

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Liquid Sky
recommendations.overview: An alien creature invades New York's punk subculture in its search for an opiate released by the brain during an orgasm.
